Philip Morris' Q3 Driven By Smoke-Free Products Amid Rising Market Share In Key Regions: Analyst Forecasts Growth Across IQOS And ZYN Brands
data.description: Philip Morris' Q3 revenue growth of 8.4% is fueled by smoke-free products and rising market share, with strong forecasts for IQOS and ZYN.

data.title: Coca-Cola Is Well-Positioned For Long-Term, Sustainable Growth, Says Goldman Sachs
data.description: Coca-Cola's Q3 2024 sales hit $11.9 billion, surpassing estimates, while unit volume declined. The company raises its 2024 revenue growth forecast to 10%.
